name: ASRock H610M-HVS/M.2 R2.0 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Intel H610 Chipset - Support DDR4-3200 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen1 - HDMI 2.1 - D-Sub - Realtek Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock H610M-HVS/M.2 R2.0 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Budget micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1700 with DDR4 support and basic connectivity.
